Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $234,037,575Details
International Box Office $582,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $816,037,575
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $28,169,501
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $42,917,310
Total $71,086,811
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Story takes place in the Harry Potter world, set 70 years prior to the Harry Potter books.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$74,403,387 (31.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$180,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,144 opening theaters/4,144 max. theaters, 6.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $323,033,715

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 18th, 2016 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
November 18th, 2016 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: November 14th, 2016 (Wide) (South Korea)
November 16th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 18th, 2016 (Wide), released as Фантастични животни и къде да ги намерим (Bulgaria)
November 18th, 2016 (Wide) (Argentina)
November 18th, 2016 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: March 7th, 2017 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some fantasy action violence.
(Rating bulletin 2440 (CErt #50647), 8/31/2016)
Running Time: 133 minutes
Franchise: Harry Potter, Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prequel
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: New York, New York City, United States
Plot point: Cryptozoology, Hidden World, Monster, Secret Magic, Witches
Social setting: Secret Societies, Supernatural
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: 1920s
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Heyday Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
